mapper.select: SELECT id, email, password, nickname, role, created_at, updated_at FROM member WHERE nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') ORDER BY nickname LIMIT 20
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member (email, password, nickname, role, social_provider, social_id) VALUES (#{email}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{role}, #{socialProvider}, #{socialId})
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET nickname = #{nickname}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE member SET password = #{password}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
